If you know a bit about my story here, it's like the comeback of the century from the guy who made all the money in the 20s, right? I was, you know, one of the richest guys in America lost everything, made huge mistakes, was smearing vilified in the press, went to jail, right? Had to get sober from drugs, I'm 15 years sober, made the money back, redeemed myself, a movie coming out about me with Leonardo DiCaprio playing me, directed by Scorsese, right? All of a sudden, Saturday, you know what that came from? It came from extraordinary standards. It came from me in that moment of truth when it was at my lowest point in life of not saying die, of knowing that there was this level up there that if I would just simply make them my musts, my musts in life, that I'd get them. And I made sure that any skills I had to learn like learning to write or whatever it was to go out there and communicate my message in a different way, whatever it might be, I was willing to do the work to learn what I had to learn, to associate with, I did the stuff that matters in the real world to make sure that my standard became a reality.
